text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at a G2 race, the Yayoi Sho. The
lineup of racers looks quite impressive.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Although, I do feel like something is lacking... on
the data collection front.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Agnes Tachyon's words, I can't help but
worry a little.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why of course. The results of this race will have
an impact on the Satsuki Sho. It would be
suboptimal to limit my possibilities, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even if it isn't G1 level, I can't exactly waltz in on
this race, can I?
